Public Attributes

string name
 
bool isNormalMap
 
bool isNormalDontKnow = false
 If we find a texture property in the result material we don't know if it is normal or not We can try to look at how it is used in the source materials. If the majority of those are normal then it is normal.

Member Data Documentation

◆ isNormalDontKnow

bool DigitalOpus.MB.Core.ShaderTextureProperty.isNormalDontKnow = false

If we find a texture property in the result material we don't know if it is normal or not We can try to look at how it is used in the source materials. If the majority of those are normal then it is normal.
